name: Backward-Facing Step
description: Flow separation and reattachment behind a sudden expansion at Re ≈ 530 (based on step height). Demonstrates separation bubble and shear layer development.

product.lesson_headline: Flow separates at sharp edges and reattaches downstream.
product.export_caption: Backward-facing step: flow separation and reattachment.
classroom_prompts: Where does the flow separate from the step?
How far downstream does reattachment occur?
What happens if the step height changes?
